productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Casual Black Belt
description: A formal essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Reid and Taylor have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes, combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal trousers, formal shoes and crisp full-sleeved shirts. Length: 96 cm Made of genuine leather with contrast stitch detail Tang clasp for a snug Fit Holes to customise fit Fixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in place Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
